# io.relate { #tspaint.io.relate }

```python
tspaint.io.relate(anc, mut, *, out_prefix=None, compress=True, convert_bin=None)
```

Convert Relate output (``.anc`` / ``.mut``) to a tskit tree sequence (CLAUDE.md §5).

Wraps ``relate_lib`` ``Convert --mode ConvertToTreeSequence [--compress]`` (run Relate itself
upstream). ``--compress`` is **load-bearing** — it unifies persistent clades into one node id
across adjacent trees, the persistence invariant the edge-blocking depends on (§5) — so keep
it on. Run :func:`check_persistence` on the result before inference (§5.1).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**anc**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Path to the Relate ``.anc`` (``.gz``) file.

<code>[**mut**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Path to the Relate ``.mut`` (``.gz``) file.

<code>[**out_prefix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Output prefix for the converted ``.trees`` (default: a tempfile prefix).

<code>[**compress**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Pass ``--compress`` (default ``True`` — load-bearing; do not turn off, §5).

<code>[**convert_bin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Path to the ``relate_lib`` ``Convert`` binary (default: env ``TSPAINT_RELATE_CONVERT`` or ``Convert`` on ``PATH``).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The converted tree sequence (node ids stable across trees thanks to ``--compress``).

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[FileNotFoundError](`FileNotFoundError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If the ``Convert`` binary or an input file is absent.

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[RuntimeError](`RuntimeError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If ``Convert`` exits nonzero.
